comment: Synthetic metastatic NSCLC adenocarcinoma, female 54, EGFR L858R initially → 24 mo on erlotinib (1G TKI) → progression with acquired T790M on ctDNA + repeat tissue NGS. Line of therapy = 2. Engine algorithm correctly resolves ALGO-NSCLC-METASTATIC-2L step 1 (T790M fires) → step 2 (no ex20ins) → step 3 → IND-NSCLC-2L-EGFR-POST-OSI-AMI-LAZ (MARIPOSA-2 ami+laz). KB-DRIFT NOTE: post-filter currently drops POST-OSI-AMI-LAZ via overly-broad biomarker_requirements_excluded (the YAML excludes histologic transformation but the engine matches by BIO-EGFR-MUTATION ID alone), so default falls to IND-NSCLC-2L-EGFR-EX20INS-AMIVANTAMAB. Surfaces a real engine/KB issue worth a follow-up. Clinically: T790M post-1G/2G TKI → osimertinib 2L is the textbook path (AURA3); KB does not yet have a dedicated post-1G/2G osi-naïve T790M Indication.

prior_lines.outcome: PD with acquired T790M on ctDNA + tissue rebiopsy
